tool_args.label: Flatbush Avenue Bus Priority

payload.description: Bus priority project on Flatbush Avenue in Brooklyn, launched with a kickoff meeting on June 30, 2022. Part of the next round of bus priority projects announced at the Transit Improvement Summit on June 16, 2022.

tool_args.label: Flatbush Avenue, Tillary Street to Kings Plaza, Brooklyn

payload.description: Critical cross-borough transportation corridor connecting downtown Brooklyn to commercial hubs, cultural and educational institutions and medical care. Three major sections: Tillary St to Empire Blvd, Empire Blvd to Nostrand Ave, Nostrand Ave to Kings Plaza.
Primary route on Flatbush Ave operating local and limited service from Kings Plaza/Bergen Beach to downtown Brooklyn. 22,500 average daily riders.

tool_args.label: Transit Improvement Summit - June 16, 2022

payload.description: Mayor Eric Adams and MTA Chair and CEO Janno Lieber announced a new collaborative effort to improve transit service, including 150 miles of new/enhanced bus lanes and busways over 4 years, and launching planning for Flatbush Avenue bus priority.
